data.title: Latin America construction market reached $9.11B in 2024, projected to grow at 4.20% CAGR, reaching $13.75B by 2034.
data.description: A report on the Latin America Construction Market projects significant growth from 2025 to 2034. In 2024, the market size was recorded at USD 9.11 billion. It is estimated to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.20% during the forecast period, potentially reaching close to USD 13.75 billion by 2034. This growth can be attributed to factors such as increased urbanization and a focus on sustainability, leading to the construction of tall buildings in the region with the use of advanced technologies.

data.title: AI for Corporate Communications In-Person Conference in Boston on October 28-30, 2025 to leverage AI for strategic communication. Join to optimize workflows and enhance engagement.
data.description: A conference titled "Elevating Corporate Communications with AI" is set to take place in Boston, United States from October 28 to October 30, 2025. The event aims to showcase how AI can revolutionize strategic communication by streamlining workflows, improving engagement, and fostering business transformation. Hosted by ResearchAndMarkets.com, this conference offers attendees the opportunity to explore the latest AI applications in corporate communication. Participants can learn how to leverage AI tools to enhance their communication strategies.

data.title: POET Technologies voluntarily delisting from TSXV, no change to Nasdaq listing with symbol "POET".
data.description: There will be no alterations to the Nasdaq listing for the common shares which will continue to be traded under the symbol "POET".

data.title: Auddia restructures engineering team for upcoming business merger.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global population has reached a new record of 7.9 billion people, with an increase of 80 million from the previous year. The United States saw a growth of 2.3 million people, bringing the total population to 335 million. Additionally, China remains the most populous country with over 1.4 billion inhabitants. These numbers highlight the continuous rise in global population and the varying growth rates across different regions.

data.title: Stock market slumps, Dow down 200 points, Nvidia hit by sellers, Alibaba surges on AI chip news.
data.description: Today, amidst a subdued personal consumption expenditures index, sellers had a significant impact on the stock indexes. The stock market saw a decline with the Dow dropping by 200 points. Notably, sellers were particularly targeting Nvidia, however, Alibaba experienced a surge following news related to AI chip advancements.

data.title: Tezos (XTZ) falls by 8.36% to $0.73 as bears aim for $0.72 support, hinting at more downside ahead.
data.description: The value of XTZ plunges to $0.73 due to a bearish trend, with technical analysis indicating potential further decline as Tezos nears significant support levels.

data.title: Strata Critical Medical to present at 2025 Jefferies Industrials Conference on Sept 4, 2025 at 11:30am ET.
data.description: Strata Critical Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: SRTA) formerly known as Blade Air Mobility, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLDE), is set to have Will Heyburn, Co-Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer, present at the 2025 Jefferies Industrials Conference on Thursday, September 4, 2025, at 11:30 am ET. The presentation will be available via webcast with a replay accessible shortly after on the investor relations section of the Company’s website at the following link: https://ir.stratacritical.com/news-events.

data.title: Atlantic Petroleum releases 2nd quarter 2025 results (NASDAQ: ATLA DKK), available on their website.
data.description: Today, on August 29, 2025, the company P/F Atlantic Petroleum (listed as ATLA DKK on NASDAQ Copenhagen) has released its 2nd quarter financial results for the year. Investors are advised to refer to the detailed information provided in Atlantic Petroleum’s Condensed Consolidated Interim Report, which is available on the company's official website.

data.title: EchoStar stock may rise as merger talks with DirecTV could revive post AT&T's spectrum deal.
data.description: There is a possibility of an increase in EchoStar's stock value if discussions of a merger between Dish Network and DirecTV are revisited, following AT&T's acquisition of wireless spectrum. This development could potentially lead to a renewed interest in EchoStar's stock.
